message:
test: Update test fixtures to match TldrFlywheelTool schema changes

Updates mock tool objects in test files to align with the current
TldrFlywheelTool interface:

Schema Changes Reflected:
- Removes deprecated 'tagline' property from mock objects
- Adds required 'useCases' array (empty for test fixtures)
- Ensures 'implementationHighlights' array is present

Test Cleanup:
- tldr-hero.test.tsx: Removes unused 'container' destructuring
- tldr-synergy-diagram.test.tsx: Updates all mockTools entries
- tldr-tool-grid.test.tsx: Updates all mockTools entries, removes
  unused 'waitFor' import

These changes ensure tests pass with the updated component props
without requiring actual use case data in the mock fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
